radar.metaMissingC4: Cannot load map metadata: missing scale or c4_base_damage
radar.metaMissingScale: Cannot load map metadata: missing scale
radar.metaMissingPosEmbeddedC4: Embedded metadata is missing pos_x/pos_y: grid and coordinates will not be drawn.
radar.metaMissingPosEmbeddedWeapon: Embedded metadata is missing pos_x/pos_y: grid will not be drawn.
radar.metaMissingPosFetchC4: Metadata is missing pos_x/pos_y: grid and coordinates will not be drawn (ranging and damage still work).
radar.metaMissingPosFetchWeapon: Metadata is missing pos_x/pos_y: grid will not be drawn (ranging still works).
radar.metaFetchFailedC4: Cannot load metadata: no embedded data and fetch failed. Open the site over HTTP or provide inline metadata.
radar.metaFetchFailedWeapon: Cannot load metadata: open the site over HTTP or provide inline MAP_META.

mapRange.help: Scroll to zoom (hover viewport); drag with left button to pan; {click} bomb site and reference circle, move to measure, {click} again to fix; right-click to clear. Values in parentheses are converted distances (1 unit = 25.4 mm).

weaponRange.help: Scroll to zoom; drag with left button to pan; {click} range start, move the mouse, {click} again to fix; right-click to clear. Range is a line segment (not a full circle).

damageCurve.title: Damage curve
damageCurve.desc: C4 damage vs distance, no armor and with armor (×0.5)
damageCurve.legendHint: No armor: damage; with armor: damage × 0.5
